text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 Russia is targeting Ukrainian mobile air-defense teams using coordinated Geran drone strikes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💥 🇺🇦 俄罗斯正利用协调一致的“天竺葵”（Geran）无人机袭击，针对乌克兰的移动防空小组。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Türkiye Warns Israel: "We Know What Netanyahu Wants in Syria" Türkiye’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan accused Israel of exploiting war to expand territory, warning it is now casting Türkiye as its next enemy. He signalled Ankara is preparing for Israel’s "clear" ambitions in Syria while denouncing its growing ties with Greece. READ MORE
text_zh: 土耳其警告以色列：“我们知道内塔尼亚胡在叙利亚想要什么”。土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹指责以色列利用战争扩张领土，并警告称以色列现在正将土耳其视为下一个敌人。他表示，安卡拉已准备好应对以色列在叙利亚的“明确”野心，同时谴责以色列与希腊日益密切的关系。阅读更多

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 Hungary is an unfriendly country - Peskov answering a question about whether the Kremlin will not congratulate Peter Magyar on his victory. We do not send congratulations to unfriendly countries. And Hungary is an unfriendly country, it supports sanctions against us At the same time, he noted that Russia is interested in building good relations with Hungary, as with all European countries. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 匈牙利是一个不友好的国家——佩斯科夫在回答克里姆林宫是否会祝贺彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）胜选的问题时表示。我们不会向不友好的国家发送贺电。匈牙利是一个不友好的国家，它支持对我们实施制裁。同时，他指出，俄罗斯有兴趣与匈牙利建立良好关系，就像与其他所有欧洲国家一样。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 "The people of Hungary have spoken, and they have reclaimed their European path." - Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 “匈牙利人民已经发声，他们夺回了自己的欧洲道路。”——帝国大区长冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has released footage showing the killing of a Hezbollah fighter in Bint Jbeil using a FPV drone. Troops of the Egoz commando unit identified and killed a alleged group planning drone attacks on Israeli forces. A short while later, another fighter was killed by an FPV drone. In a separate incident, the Maglan commando unit identified three fighters, who were killed in a precision airstrike. The IDF also destroyed a loaded launcher ready to fire at Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方发布了一段视频，显示在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）使用FPV无人机击毙了一名真主党武装人员。Egoz突击队士兵识别并击毙了一个据称正在策划对以色列军队进行无人机袭击的小组。不久后，另一名武装人员也被FPV无人机击毙。在另一起事件中，Maglan突击队识别出三名武装人员，他们在一场精确空袭中被击毙。以军还摧毁了一个已装填完毕、准备向以色列发射的发射器。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: The U.S. military has sent a formal notice to mariners detailing enforcement of the naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea, east of the Strait of Hormuz. The blockade applies to all vessels regardless of flag. Any ship entering or exiting the restricted area without authorisation may be stopped, diverted or seized. Free passage through the strait itself to non‑Iranian destinations will be maintained. Humanitarian shipments of food, medicine and essential goods will be permitted subject to inspection. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：美国军方已向海员发出正式通知，详细说明了霍尔木兹海峡以东、阿曼湾和阿拉伯海的海上封锁执行情况。封锁适用于所有船只，无论悬挂何国旗帜。任何未经授权进入或离开限制区域的船只都可能被拦截、改道或扣押。前往非伊朗目的地的船只通过海峡本身的自由通行权将得到维持。运送食品、药品和必需品的人道主义物资在接受检查后将被允许通行。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Special documentation of a precise drone strike: Commando Unit forces eliminated terrorists who were operating against our forces Commando Unit forces continue their activity in the Bint Jbeil area to expand the security zone. Maglan Unit forces located and eliminated yesterday three armed terrorists with the aid of advanced observation means. The terrorists were on their way to carry out a terror attack against IDF forces in the immediate timeframe and were eliminated in a precise aerial strike>> MUST WATCH 🔴 IDF releases video of an FPV drone strike eliminating a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以军：精确无人机打击的特别记录：突击队部队消灭了针对我军行动的恐怖分子。突击队部队继续在宾特朱拜勒地区开展行动，以扩大安全区。Maglan部队昨日在先进观测手段的帮助下定位并消灭了三名武装恐怖分子。这些恐怖分子正准备在近期对以军发动恐怖袭击，并在一次精确的空中打击中被消灭>> 必看 🔴 以军发布视频，显示在黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒使用FPV无人机击毙一名真主党武装人员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel 10 AM IS IN TWO HOURS. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）上午10点，还有两个小时。推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 IDF releases video of an FPV drone strike eliminating a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）必看 🔴 以军发布视频，显示在黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒使用FPV无人机击毙一名真主党武装人员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Monitoring channels report a strike on the "Apatit" chemical plant in the Vologda region of the Russian Federation. The plant specializes in the production of phosphorus-containing fertilizers, as well as phosphoric and sulfuric acids, which are used in the manufacturing of explosives. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 监测频道报道称，俄罗斯联邦沃洛格达地区的“Apatit”化工厂遭到袭击。该工厂专门生产含磷肥料，以及用于制造炸药的磷酸和硫酸。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 A military source warns the IRGC could respond as early as tonight, including potential strikes on U.S. and Israeli targets tied to Strait of Hormuz developments. The IDF is bracing for escalation and a possible ceasefire collapse, updating its target bank and intensifying monitoring inside Iran. “Now is the time. Ground crews and technical teams are working around the clock to bring all Air Force platforms to peak readiness. We are reviewing targets, orders, and operational plans,” the source said. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）最新消息 🔴 一名军方消息人士警告称，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）最早可能在今晚做出回应，包括对与霍尔木兹海峡事态发展有关的美国和以色列目标进行潜在打击。以军正为局势升级和停火协议可能破裂做准备，更新其目标库并加强对伊朗境内的监控。“现在是时候了。地勤人员和技术团队正全天候工作，使所有空军平台达到巅峰战备状态。我们正在审查目标、命令和作战计划，”该消息人士称。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: USS USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) passed eastbound through the Strait of Gibraltar. Getting close to theater. @PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043659727901512012/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）新消息：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）向东通过直布罗陀海峡。正在接近战区。 @PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043659727901512012/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Several vessels have transited the Strait of Hormuz over the last 36 hours, though levels are less than 15% of normal, inbound and outbound. The vast majority of them are using the Iranian traffic separation scheme transiting near Larak island. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043657968508441062/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 过去36小时内，有几艘船只通过了霍尔木兹海峡，尽管进出港数量不到正常水平的15%。绝大多数船只都在拉拉克岛（Larak island）附近使用伊朗的交通分离方案航行。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043657968508441062/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a notable announcement, as a part of a slew of new defense appointments in Australia following the end of previous terms, Australian Defense Minister Richard Marles announced today that they plan to appoint Lieutenant General Susan Coyle as Chief of Army, making her the first woman to fill the role. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在一项引人注目的公告中，作为澳大利亚前任任期结束后一系列新国防任命的一部分，澳大利亚国防部长理查德·马尔斯（Richard Marles）今天宣布，他们计划任命苏珊·科伊尔（Susan Coyle）中将为陆军参谋长，使她成为首位担任该职位的女性。推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking today during a cabinet meeting, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin confirmed that he spoke yesterday with U.S. Vice President JD Vance as he returned from the failed peace negotiations with Iran in Islamabad. Netanyahu stated that, “He reported to me in detail, as this administration does every day, about the development of the negotiations. In this case, the explosion in the negotiations. The explosion came from the American side, which could not tolerate Iran's blatant violation of the agreement to enter the negotiations.” According to the Prime Minister, the agreement discussed during the negotiations involved a total ceasefire by the United States, in exchange for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, the removal of highly-enriched nuclear material from Iran, and a several decades-long suspension in the enrichment of additional uranium by Iran. Which was rejected by the representatives of the Islamic Republic. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 以色列总理本雅明在今天内阁会议期间发言时证实，他昨天与美国副总统JD·万斯（JD Vance）进行了交谈，当时万斯正从与伊朗在伊斯兰堡进行的失败和平谈判中返回。内塔尼亚胡表示：“他像本届政府每天所做的那样，向我详细报告了谈判的进展。在这种情况下，是谈判的破裂。破裂来自美方，美方无法容忍伊朗公然违反进入谈判的协议。”据总理称，谈判中讨论的协议涉及美国全面停火，以换取伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡、从伊朗移除高浓缩核材料，以及伊朗暂停额外铀浓缩数十年。这遭到了伊朗伊斯兰共和国代表的拒绝。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Navy Nimitz-class nuclear-powered aircraft carrier, the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77), transited the Strait of Gibraltar eastbound, entering the U.S. Navy's 6th Fleet/U.S. European Command (EUCOM) area of responsibility. Photo: @PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043655601348018479/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国海军尼米兹级核动力航空母舰“乔治·H·W·布什”号（CVN-77）向东通过直布罗陀海峡，进入美国海军第六舰队/美国欧洲司令部（EUCOM）的责任区。照片：@PeterFerrary https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043655601348018479/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Head of Iran's Judiciary, Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje'i: Iran's Judiciary Switches to Full Wartime Mode Against Spies & Traitors 🔹 In dealing with spies, treacherous elements, and the invading enemy’s foot soldiers, our formation is completely wartime and matches the conditions of war . 🔹 While respecting the law and justice, we will show maximum firmness and speed in handling their cases. These files are no longer subject to normal peacetime procedures. 🔹 Until further notice, the Judiciary will maintain a wartime formation in cases involving enemy collaborators . We operate under war rules, not ordinary ones.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗司法部长戈拉姆-侯赛因·莫赫塞尼-埃杰伊（Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje'i）：伊朗司法系统转入针对间谍和叛徒的全面战时状态 🔹 在处理间谍、叛国分子和入侵敌人的步兵时，我们的编制完全是战时的，符合战争条件。 🔹 在尊重法律和正义的同时，我们将以最大的坚定和速度处理他们的案件。这些档案不再适用正常的和平时期程序。 🔹 在另行通知之前，司法系统将在涉及敌方合作者的案件中保持战时编制。我们按照战争规则运作，而不是普通规则。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇳🇬 🇮🇷 🇾🇪 ⚡️ Sheikh Zakzaky: The Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb Belong to the Nations of Iran and Yemen Leader of the Islamic Movement in Nigeria: 🔹 The Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb are not ownerless territories; they belong to the nations of Iran and Yemen. 🔹 We call on the aggressor groups to withdraw, admit their defeat, and abandon any thought of launching new acts of aggression.
text_zh: 🇳🇬 🇮🇷 🇾🇪 ⚡️ 扎克扎基（Zakzaky）谢赫：霍尔木兹海峡和曼德海峡属于伊朗和也门人民。尼日利亚伊斯兰运动领导人： 🔹 霍尔木兹海峡和曼德海峡不是无主领土；它们属于伊朗和也门人民。 🔹 我们呼吁侵略集团撤军，承认失败，并放弃任何发动新侵略行为的念头。

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Five Chinese COSCO tankers scheduled to transit the Strait of Hormuz this week are now stuck and will not proceed until the situation clears up
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 原定于本周通过霍尔木兹海峡的五艘中国中远海运（COSCO）油轮目前被困，在局势明朗之前不会继续航行

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy parliament speaker, Ali Nikzad, said the goal of the United States in the Isfahan operation was to seize uranium, but they failed. He stated that Iran was ready to demonstrate goodwill by diluting 450 kilograms of enriched uranium – not handing it over. In previous negotiations, a consortium for uranium dilution with US and Saudi participation was planned, but they backed out. He also noted that the U.S. proposed establishing a legal framework for the Strait of Hormuz that would include Americans, adding: “What do they have to do with the strait?” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会副议长阿里·尼克扎德（Ali Nikzad）表示，美国在伊斯法罕行动中的目标是夺取铀，但他们失败了。他表示，伊朗准备通过稀释450公斤浓缩铀来展示善意——而不是将其移交。在之前的谈判中，曾计划建立一个有美国和沙特参与的铀稀释财团，但他们退出了。他还指出，美国提议为霍尔木兹海峡建立一个包括美国人在内的法律框架，并补充说：“海峡与他们有什么关系？” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: The ceasefire with Iran could end quickly.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：与伊朗的停火可能很快结束。

text: EU's von der Leyen: Moving to qualified majority voting in foreign policy is an important way to avoid systematic blockages as we've seen in the past. We should use the momentum now really to move forward on that topic.
text_zh: 欧盟冯德莱恩：转向外交政策中的特定多数表决是避免像过去那样出现系统性阻碍的重要方式。我们现在应该利用这一势头，真正推动该议题的进展。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli military lawyer Idan Dvir has been indicted for sexually exploiting at least ten female soldiers and pre‑recruits whom he represented. According to the indictment, he offered to waive legal fees of between 2,000 and 10,000 shekels in exchange for sexual acts, and in some cases sent a price list detailing the value of each act. In one instance, he asked a soldier: “If I release you today, do I deserve compensation?” He also allegedly drove a client to his home and forced sexual acts on her. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列军事律师伊丹·德维尔（Idan Dvir）因性剥削他所代理的至少十名女兵和预备役人员而被起诉。根据起诉书，他提出以性行为换取免除2,000至10,000谢克尔的律师费，并在某些情况下发送了一份详细说明每项行为价值的价目表。有一次，他问一名士兵：“如果我今天释放你，我是否应该得到补偿？”他还被指控将一名客户带回家并强迫她进行性行为。 @wfwitness

text: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 “我不害怕特朗普政府，也不害怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信这就是我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。”——教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that Israel will only release Lebanese prisoners through force. Al‑Mousawi emphasised that Hezbollah has deep experience with Israel and knows how it negotiates every comma and period, and therefore Hezbollah’s agenda is different. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离，且只有国家拥有决定权……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Mousawi）表示，该组织与以色列进行任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩土地。“除非受到武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒泥土上撤走，”他表示，并补充说以色列只会通过武力释放黎巴嫩囚犯。穆萨维强调，真主党对以色列有深刻的了解，知道它如何就每一个逗号和句号进行谈判，因此真主党的议程是不同的。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he spoke with U.S. Vice President JD Vance, who reported that talks collapsed because Iran violated the agreement to open the Strait of Hormuz after a ceasefire. The U.S. central demand is the removal…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli army radio noted a significant nuance in Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s remarks: The US demand is for no uranium enrichment in Iran “in the coming years, and that could be decades” – not a permanent ban. This suggests a sunset clause similar to the 2015 JCPOA, which limited enrichment for 10 years. Trump withdrew from that agreement in 2018 precisely because it allowed Iran to resume advanced enrichment after a set period. The report questions whether the Trump administration is now advancing a deal that includes the same problematic sunset provision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他与美国副总统JD·万斯进行了交谈，万斯报告称谈判破裂，因为伊朗违反了停火后开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议。美国的核心要求是移除……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台指出了以色列总理内塔尼亚胡言论中的一个重要细微差别：美国的要求是“在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内”伊朗不得进行铀浓缩——而不是永久禁止。这表明存在类似于2015年《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA）的日落条款，该条款限制了10年的浓缩活动。特朗普在2018年退出该协议，正是因为它允许伊朗在一段特定时间后恢复先进浓缩活动。该报道质疑特朗普政府现在是否正在推进一项包含同样有问题的日落条款的协议。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Yesterday, I spoke with Vice President JD Vance, who called me from his plane while returning from a trip. He briefed me in detail, as this administration does daily, on the developments in the negotiations. He conveyed to me that the central issue for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material and ensuring that there will be no enrichment in Iran for years to come, possibly decades. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡：昨天，我与副总统JD·万斯进行了交谈，他在结束旅行返回的飞机上给我打了电话。他像本届政府每天所做的那样，向我详细介绍了谈判的进展。他向我传达了特朗普总统和美国的核心议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保伊朗在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内不再进行浓缩。推文

text: EU's von der Leyen on Hungary: The people of Hungary have spoken, and they have reclaimed their European path. Our union is stronger and more united; it was an exceptional evening yesterday.
text_zh: 欧盟冯德莱恩谈匈牙利：匈牙利人民已经发声，他们夺回了自己的欧洲道路。我们的联盟更加强大、更加团结；昨天是一个非凡的夜晚。

text: The Spectator Index Netanyahu says ceasefire with Iran could end soon. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 内塔尼亚胡称与伊朗的停火可能很快结束。推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Since Iran violated the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege, and we of course support this firm position. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652564898488334/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡：由于伊朗违反了规则，特朗普决定实施封锁、海上围困，我们当然支持这一坚定立场。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652564898488334/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: 'The ceasefire is like a coin - it can flip very quickly' https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652371113251097/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡：“停火就像一枚硬币——它可以翻转得非常快” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652371113251097/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu: We have alignment with the most powerful nation in the world, and together we have the capability to confront the gravest threats. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652247171531023/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡总理：我们与世界上最强大的国家保持一致，我们共同有能力应对最严重的威胁。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652247171531023/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043651899870650763/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043651899870650763/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Bloomberg, citing a Cypriot official, the EU is looking to push through a €90 billion loan for Ukraine now that Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban‘a government is on the way out. Prime Minister Orbán previously blocked the loan and the incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar is expected to allow the loan to be pushed through. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据彭博社援引塞浦路斯官员的话称，随着匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orban）的政府即将下台，欧盟正寻求推动向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款。欧尔班总理此前曾阻止该贷款，预计即将上任的总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）将允许该贷款获得通过。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Ursula von der Leyen reacts to Hungary's election results: "It is a victory for fundamental freedoms" and says EU should look at the lessons learned like moving "to qualified majority voting in foreign policy... to avoid systemic blockages as we've seen in the past." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043650219619827941/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在——乌苏拉·冯德莱恩对匈牙利选举结果做出反应：“这是基本自由的胜利”，并表示欧盟应该审视所吸取的教训，例如转向“外交政策中的特定多数表决……以避免我们过去所见的那种系统性阻碍。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043650219619827941/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu at today's cabinet meeting: "I spoke yesterday with Vice President J.D. Vance. He called me from his plane back from Islamabad. He reported to me in detail, as the people of this administration do every day, about the development of the negotiations. In this case, the breakdown in negotiations. The breakdown came from the American side, which could not tolerate Iran's blatant violation of the agreement to enter negotiations. The agreement was that they stop firing, and the Iranians immediately open the straits. They didn't do it. The Americans could not accept it. He also made clear to me that the main issue on the agenda for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material, and to ensure there is no more enrichment in the coming years, and it could be decades, no enrichment inside Iran. That is their focus. Of course it is also important to us." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡在今天的内阁会议上：“我昨天与副总统J.D.万斯进行了交谈。他在从伊斯兰堡返回的飞机上给我打了电话。他像本届政府的人每天所做的那样，向我详细报告了谈判的进展。在这种情况下，是谈判的破裂。破裂来自美方，美方无法容忍伊朗公然违反进入谈判的协议。协议是他们停止射击，伊朗人立即开放海峡。他们没有这样做。美国人无法接受。他还向我明确表示，特朗普总统和美国议程上的主要议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内，伊朗境内不再有浓缩活动。这是他们的重点。当然，这对我们也很重要。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Rep. Anna Paulina Luna is preparing to bring a motion to expel Rep. Eric Swalwell from Congress, with some Democrats reportedly willing to support it. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043648497593745617/video/1 Over 50 former staffers of U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) are calling for his immediate resignation and exit from the race for California governor. “The (sexual assault) allegations reported by the San Francisco Chronicle and CNN are serious, credible, and demand responsibility.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）众议员安娜·保利娜·卢纳（Anna Paulina Luna）正准备提出一项动议，将众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell）逐出国会，据报道一些民主党人愿意支持该动议。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043648497593745617/video/1 超过50名美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（加利福尼亚州民主党）的前工作人员呼吁他立即辞职并退出加利福尼亚州州长竞选。“《旧金山纪事报》和CNN报道的（性侵犯）指控是严重的、可信的，需要承担责任。” - 开源情报推文

text: EU's von der Leyen: We need to scale up the homegrown, affordable, reliable energy—this is the wide range of different renewables we have, but it is also the nuclear.
text_zh: 欧盟冯德莱恩：我们需要扩大本土的、负担得起的、可靠的能源——这是我们拥有的广泛的可再生能源，但也包括核能。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Zionist media reported that a Hezbollah missile struck the settlement of Karmiel.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义媒体报道称，一枚真主党导弹击中了卡尔米尔（Karmiel）定居点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature."…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision to negotiate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿以大使级开启。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅（Ghassan Salamé）表示，此次会议不是为了谈判，而是为了‘后勤性质的讨论或谈话’……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离，且只有国家拥有谈判的决定权。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu compares nuclear facilities to extermination camps: If we had not acted, then places like Natanz, Fordow, and Bushehr would be remembered like Auschwitz, Majdanek, and Sobibor.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡将核设施比作灭绝营：如果我们没有采取行动，那么纳坦兹（Natanz）、福尔多（Fordow）和布什尔（Bushehr）这些地方就会像奥斯威辛（Auschwitz）、马伊达内克（Majdanek）和索比堡（Sobibor）一样被铭记。

text: Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister…" ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said. The proposal remains under internal and inter‑agency review. “The authority, control, and supervision of Indonesian airspace remains fully in the hands of Indonesia,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示，正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）将与印尼国防部长会面……” ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未批准美国军用飞机进入其领空。国防部发言人表示，全面飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，也不具有法律约束力。该提案仍在内部和跨部门审查中。他补充说：“印尼领空的权威、控制和监督权完全掌握在印尼手中。” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: We have alignment with the most powerful nation in the world, and together we have the capability to confront the gravest threats.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我们与世界上最强大的国家保持一致，我们共同有能力应对最严重的威胁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will…" ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will likely negatively impact global markets. “Many details remain unclear and incomprehensible, so I would refrain from making any substantive comments at this time,” he told reporters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为恢复霍尔木兹海峡航行自由的和平多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议。该倡议将……” ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 克里姆林宫发言人德米特里·佩斯科夫（Dmitry Peskov）表示，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁可能会对全球市场产生负面影响。“许多细节仍不清楚且难以理解，所以我目前不会发表任何实质性评论，”他告诉记者。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: Since Iran violated the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege, and we of course support this firm position.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：由于伊朗违反了规则，特朗普决定实施封锁、海上围困，我们当然支持这一坚定立场。

text: Netanyahu: Yesterday, I spoke with Vice President JD Vance, who called me from his plane while returning from a trip. He briefed me in detail, as this administration does daily, on the developments in the negotiations. He conveyed to me that the central issue for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material and ensuring that there will be no enrichment in Iran for years to come, possibly decades.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：昨天，我与副总统JD·万斯进行了交谈，他在结束旅行返回的飞机上给我打了电话。他像本届政府每天所做的那样，向我详细介绍了谈判的进展。他向我传达了特朗普总统和美国的核心议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保伊朗在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内不再进行浓缩。
